category_sources: Official docs.rs crate page describes minijinja-cli as a command-line executable that renders Jinja2 templates to stdout.
source_facts.description says it renders Jinja2 templates directly from the command line.
display_name_sources: Official crate/repository name is minijinja-cli; MiniJinja is the project name used by the official repository.
docs_sources: Official Rust crate documentation on docs.rs covers minijinja-cli and MiniJinja; official GitHub README is the repository documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/mitsuhiko/minijinja; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official docs.rs crate page identifies command-line Jinja2 template rendering.
source_facts.description and executable name confirm CLI usage.
